case_title: YAMAMOTO KAY K VS MCALEENAN AIDAN J/JUNIPERO SERRA HOUSE ADM.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCALEENAN AIDAN J/JUNIPERO SERRA HOUSE ADM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAMAMOTO KAY K IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCALEENAN AIDAN J/JUNIPERO SERRA HOUSE ADM. INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR DEFAULT AND MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION- DENIED PER PRO TEM ART GROZA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY YAMAMOTO KAY K AS TO DEFENDANT MCALEENAN AIDAN J/JUNIPERO SERRA HOUSE ADM. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
MOTION TO ENTER DEFAULT AND SET IT ASIDE AND PROCE ED WITH THE RECONSIDERATION POINTS OF AUTHORITIES, SET FOR FEBRUARY 16,1993 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT.6
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO AIDAN MCALEENAN, RETURNED.
